que: What is the primary purpose of the TextButton widget in Flutter?
options: To create a raised primary action button
To create a Material Design flat button for less prominent actions
To display only icons without text
To show a floating circular button

que: Which parameter of TextButton is called when the button is tapped?
Which parameter of TextButton is required and represents the button’s child widget?
Which parameter of TextButton allows you to customize its visual appearance?
Which parameter of TextButton is used to handle a long-press gesture?

options: For secondary or less important actions

que: Which of the following is listed as something to avoid with TextButton?
options: Using for primary actions—prefer ElevatedButton instead

que: What should you not forget to provide for a functional TextButton?
What is the type of the onPressed parameter in TextButton?
What is the type of the style parameter in TextButton?
Which parameter of TextButton controls whether it should automatically receive focus?
What is the default value of the autofocus parameter in TextButton?
Which parameter of TextButton controls how its content is clipped?
What is the default value of clipBehavior in TextButton?
Which parameter lets you specify the focus node used for keyboard focus on TextButton?
Which statement best describes the child parameter of TextButton?
options: It must always be a Text widget
It must always be an Icon widget
It can be any Widget, usually a Text or Icon
It is optional and can be omitted

que: Which of these is a good example use case for TextButton?
options: A 'Forgot password?' secondary action below a form
A floating action button in the corner
